response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks explicit executive leadership experience, fintech-specific domain knowledge, and a proven track record in scaling engineering teams or architecting multi-agent AI systems in production for regulated environments.
strengths: Diverse technical background with hands-on experience in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and real-time data processing.
Contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators) and open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) show initiative in emerging tech.
Strong problem-solving skills and community engagement (workshops, talks) indicate ability to mentor and drive technical culture.
concerns: No explicit experience in fintech infrastructure (credit systems, payment flows, regulatory compliance) or high-stakes AI deployments.
Lacks demonstrated executive leadership (e.g., scaling teams from 10 to 30+, developing technical leadership layers).
Agentic AI experience appears limited to tooling/frameworks rather than end-to-end production systems with feedback loops and observability.
